const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000});

text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court ca10 --docket 69641076 --event evt-appeal-disposition && rg --files data/cases/ca10/69641076 . | rg '(^|/)(record|evt-appeal-disposition|69641076)(/|$)' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"record/context\\.json|record/documents|latest snapshot|provision.*record|CELL.*DIR|RECORD.*DIR\" .github src tests docs | head -n 240 && find . /tmp -path '*/record/context.json' -o -path '*69641076*' 2>/dev/null | sort | head -n 240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/ca10/69641076/events/evt-appeal-disposition/event.yaml && wc -c data/cases/ca10/69641076/record/snapshots/2026-07-11.json && jq . data/cases/ca10/69641076/record/snapshots/2026-07-11.json && find data/cases/ca10/69641076/record/documents -maxdepth 1 -type f -print 2>/dev/null | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"if [ -d data/cases/ca10/69641076/record/documents ]; then find data/cases/ca10/69641076/record/documents -maxdepth 1 -type f -print -exec sh -c 'wc -c \"$1\"; sed -n \"1,240p\" \"$1\"' _ {} \\;; else echo 'No provisioned documents directory.'; fi\njq . data/cases/ca10/69641076/record/context.json\nif [ -n \"${DECIDED_BEFORE:-}\" ]; then printf 'DECIDED_BEFORE is set: %s\\n' \"$DECIDED_BEFORE\"; else echo 'DECIDED_BEFORE is not set'; fi","workdir":"/home

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,95p' metrics/statpack.md && sed -n '1,90p' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
